one_line_ask: Take the client's AI-generated raster logo, clean and de-skew it, isolate the mark on transparency, trace it into a crisp scalable SVG, and derive a full multi-platform vector + raster export kit that stays high-quality at every size and format.
brief: Northwind Analytics generated their logo in AI and only has a flat 1024x1024 PNG of it — a teal-and-charcoal wordmark-plus-icon (a stylized wind/data-flow glyph) sitting on a faint off-white textured card, with the soft anti-aliased edges, slight noise, and a baseline that tips a couple of degrees off level that AI image tools typically produce. They cannot use this raster on their website header, app icon, pitch deck, sign vinyl, or one-color merch because it does not scale and has no transparency. The freelancer must deliver a production vector kit: (1) auto-straighten and tonally clean the raster so edges are sharp and the background is even; (2) tighten the crop to the artwork; (3) isolate just the logo mark from its background card and flatten the background to pure white so the trace is clean; (4) produce a transparent cut-out of the mark; (5) VECTORIZE the cleaned mark into a crisp full-color SVG that scales to any size; (6) derive a single-color / knockout vector (logo silhouette filled solid for one-color print, vinyl, embroidery and small favicons) by selecting the mark, inverting, solid-filling the field, and re-vectorizing; (7) produce a halftone "print-screen" treatmen
